zh.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland是Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland和Margaret Mar的兒子，於大約1310年出生在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮。他於1345年與Margaret Bruce結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1370年2月27日在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭享年61歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland是Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland和Margaret Mar的儿子，于大约1310年出生在苏格兰薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮。他于1345年与Margaret Bruce结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1370年2月27日在苏格兰薩瑟蘭享年61岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland was born about 1310, in Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland as the son of Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland and Margaret Mar. He married Margaret Bruce in 1345. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 27 February 1370, in Sutherland, Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland est né environ 1310, à Golspie, Sutherland, Écosse, fils de Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland et Margaret Mar. Il a épousé Margaret Bruce en 1345. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 27 février 1370, à Sutherland, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland wurde um 1310 in Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, als Sohn von Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland und Margaret Mar geboren. Er hat 1345 Margaret Bruce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Februar 1370 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sutherland, Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland è nato il circa 1310 nel Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland come figlio di Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland e Margaret Mar. Lui sposato Margaret Bruce nel 1345. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 febbraio 1370, nel Sutherland, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherlandは約1310年にスコットランドススエルランドゴルスパでKenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of SutherlandとMargaret Marの息子として生まれた。1345年にMargaret Bruceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1370年2月27日にスコットランドススエルランドで61歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland(은)는 대략 1310년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드 골스피에서 Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland(와)과 Margaret Mar의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1345년 Margaret Bruce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1370년 2월 27일 스컷랜드 서덜랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland filho de Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland e Margaret Mar. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bruce em 1345. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1370, em Sutherland, Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland родился около 1310 г. в местности голспи, сутирланд, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland и Margaret Mar. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bruce в 1345 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 27 февраля 1370 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: William de Moravia 5th Earl of Sutherland nació aproximadamente 1310, en Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland como hijo de Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland y Margaret Mar. Se casó con Margaret Bruce en 1345. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1370, en Sutherland, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
